title: More Waystones
description: Adds more waystone varients to the Fabric Waystones Mod by LordDeatHunter
body:
Requires:https://modrinth.com/mod/fwaystones

This mod is an addon to the Fabric Waystones made by LordDeatHunter which adds more varients of the waystone block created in the fabric waystones mod. These blocks can be used to transport the user to each active waystone block for a cost (can be configured in the fabric waystones config). Each Waystone Block will require one abyss watcher, an emerald, obsideon, and 6 other blocks/items which relate to the waystone being crafted.

I am open to suggestions on textures and new waystone varients in my discord server linked in the modrith page.
